original_snippet_context: General discussion about social legislation and economic policy.
relevant_quote: O Sr. Affonso Penna uão 6 Metalista. Parece mesmo adversário dus doutrinas econômicas, que provoca* Íum a organização revolucionaria do perarlndo.
justification: While mentioning Afonso Penna's opposition to certain economic doctrines, it doesn't explicitly link this to the Caixa de Conversão.  It's unclear whether these "doutrinas econômicas" refer to orthodox monetary policies related to the Caixa or something else entirely.
